items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 106.5 mph at a 8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Washington Nationals, KC 6, WSH 2. Carter Jensen led the night, 4-4 | HR, 2B, BB in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 106.5 mph.
items.title: Royals at Nationals Recap
